text: Would you tell me uh what happened in that case? I am ah we have instructed this instrument to refrain from calling us unless it is within this set of circumsklived circumstances in the event of which you speak. This instrument was asked a question which pertained to what you have a being calling a the ra material. This instrument was a providing the voice for our brothers and sisters of the a wisdom, a density known to you as a latwe this instrument a thought to itself. I do not know this answer. I wish I were channeling Ra the ones of Latwi found themselves in the opposition of a being approached by the Orion entity which seeks to be of service in its own way. The instrument a began to a prepare for Ra contact Allah Tui that if this was completed the Orion entity would have an opportunity which a lotwee wished to avoid. And secondly, that there were those in the support group at that time which sent great amounts of support to the instrument in this crux. Thus, what occurred was the ones of la tui and never let go of this instrument, although this came perilously close to a breaking the way of a confusion, it continued to hold its connection with the mind, body, spirit complex of the instrument and to generate information through it, even as the instrument began a to a slip out of its physical vehicle. The act of continued communication caused the entity to be unable to grasp the instruments mind, body, spirit, complex, and after but a small measure of your space time, a la toy, a recovered of the now a completely amalgamated instrument, and I gave it continued communication to steady it during the transition of back into integration.

segment.segment: Would you tell me uh what happened in that case?
I am ah we have instructed this instrument to refrain from calling us unless it is within this set of circumsklived circumstances in the event of which you speak.
This instrument was asked a question which pertained to what you have a being calling a the ra material.
This instrument was a providing the voice for our brothers and sisters of the a wisdom, a density known to you as a latwe this instrument a thought to itself.
I do not know this answer.
I wish I were channeling Ra the ones of Latwi found themselves in the opposition of a being approached by the Orion entity which seeks to be of service in its own way.
The instrument a began to a prepare for Ra contact Allah Tui that if this was completed the Orion entity would have an opportunity which a lotwee wished to avoid.
And secondly, that there were those in the support group at that time which sent great amounts of support to the instrument in this crux.

Thus, what occurred was the ones of la tui and never let go of this instrument, although this came perilously close to a breaking the way of a confusion, it continued to hold its connection with the mind, body, spirit complex of the instrument and to generate information through it, even as the instrument began a to a slip out of its physical vehicle.

The act of continued communication caused the entity to be unable to grasp the instruments mind, body, spirit, complex, and after but a small measure of your space time, a la toy, a recovered of the now a completely amalgamated instrument, and I gave it continued communication to steady it during the transition of back into integration.
